ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "position_number" INTEGER /* Position number of the player */,
  "play_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is expected to play */,
  "height" REAL /* Player height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player weight in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player birth date */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "projected_fd_pts" REAL /* Projected Fantasy Draft Points */,
  "actual_fd_pts" REAL /* Actual Fantasy Draft Points achieved */,
  "found_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was found in the database */,
  "projected_rebounds" REAL /* Projected rebounds for the player */,
  "projected_assists" REAL /* Projected assists for the player */,
  "projected_steals" REAL /* Projected steals for the player */,
  "projected_blocks" REAL /* Projected blocks for the player */,
  "actual_rebounds" REAL /* Actual rebounds by the player */,
  "actual_assists" REAL /* Actual assists by the player */,
  "actual_steals" REAL /* Actual steals by the player */,
  "actual_blocks" REAL /* Actual blocks by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary as per the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "guaranteed_amount" INTEGER /* Guaranteed amount in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the game */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rosters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "fg_attempts" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts by the player */,
  "three_pt_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_attempts" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts by the player */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy draft */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the fantasy draft */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Draft position of the player */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy team */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_drafts_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the fantasy team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Total value of the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time for the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
